home.heroDesc: AgriConnect helps small landholders increase productivity, sell directly to consumers, rent the equipment they need, and access the schemes they deserve.
home.featuresTitle: Everything a small farm needs, in one place.
home.featuresSubtitle: A digital cooperative — built for farmers, with consumers in mind.
home.f1Desc: Farmers sell produce straight to consumers — no middlemen, fair prices.
home.f2Desc: Book tractors, harvesters, sprayers and more — by the day, online.
home.f3Desc: Track market prices and trends so you sell at the right time.
home.f4Desc: Eligibility, benefits and direct links to PM-KISAN, PMFBY, KCC and more.
home.f5Desc: Chat with farmers and buyers without leaving the platform.
home.f6Desc: All transactions are processed via a secure simulated payment gateway.
home.directFromFarmerDesc: Every order helps a small landholder earn a fairer price for their hard work.
home.productsSubtitle: Everything farmers need, all in one marketplace
home.harvestDesc: Biggest Discounts of the Season! Bumper Harvest Deals!
home.harvestOffer1: Up to 40% off on fresh produce
home.directFromFarmsDesc: Connect directly with farmers. No middlemen. Fair prices for all.
home.qualityDesc: All products verified for quality. Premium selection only.
home.diverseDesc: Wide variety of crops and products from across India.
home.fastDesc: Right to your doorstep. Tracked and insured.
home.topPicksDesc: Popular products and deals right now
home.ctaDesc: Join AgriConnect as a farmer or a consumer and be part of a fairer agricultural economy.
home.weatherDesc: Get 14-day weather forecasts with farming-specific recommendations for your location.
home.farmingDesc: Access expert tips on crop selection, pest management, and seasonal farming practices.
home.clubDesc: Join our club for free delivery, priority booking, and exclusive member offers.
home.freeDeliveryDesc: Get your orders delivered quickly with no additional charges.
home.priorityDesc: Get priority access to equipment rental and seasonal offers.
home.offersDesc: Enjoy special discounts and deals available only for members.

weather.rainfallMsg: Multiple rainy days expected. Ensure proper drainage. Avoid pesticide application.
weather.heatMsg: Very high temperatures expected. Increase irrigation frequency and mulch fields.

weather.droughtMsg: Dry conditions ahead. Plan irrigation carefully. Consider drought-resistant crops.
weather.windMsg: High winds expected. Secure loose structures. Delay spraying activities.

about.title: About the project
about.problemDesc: Small land holdings and the challenges in increasing productivity. The vast majority of Indian farmers operate on less than 2 hectares of land. Their income is squeezed by middlemen, lack of mechanisation, limited market information, and low awareness of government support.
about.whatLine1: Connects farmers directly with consumers through a transparent marketplace.
about.whatLine2: Enables online booking of agricultural equipment so small farmers can rent instead of buying.
about.whatLine3: Provides crop-wise market prices and best practices.
about.whatLine4: Lists key government schemes (PM-KISAN, PMFBY, KCC, PMKSY, e-NAM and others) with eligibility and links.
about.whatLine5: Offers role-based dashboards, secure payments, ratings & reviews, in-app messaging and an onboarding tour for first-time users.
about.techStorage: localStorage as a prototype data layer
about.disclaimer: This is a student-built prototype. Payments are simulated; no real money changes hands. Government scheme links point to the official portals.

footer.tagline: Empowering small landholders by connecting them directly with consumers, equipment, market intelligence and government support.
footer.problem: Problem statement: Small land holdings and challenges in increasing productivity.
footer.built: Built with React, TypeScript & Tailwind CSS.

mapView.approximate: Some locations are approximate (city not in our coordinate database).

onboarding.welcomeDesc: We help small farmers grow productivity and earnings. Let's take a quick tour of what you can do.
onboarding.quickTour: Get fresh produce direct from farmers and rent equipment in seconds. Quick tour?
onboarding.marketplaceStep1: List your produce, set your own price, and sell directly to consumers — no middlemen.
onboarding.marketplaceStep2: Browse fresh, transparently-priced produce from verified small farmers. Filter by crop, location and price.
onboarding.equipmentStep1: List under-utilised tractors, sprayers and tools to earn extra income.
onboarding.equipmentStep2: Book tractors, harvesters and tools by the day. Filter by category, location, price and availability.
onboarding.cropsDesc: Track wholesale prices, season info and best-practice tips for higher yield on small holdings.
onboarding.schemesDesc: Eligibility, benefits and direct links to PM-KISAN, PMFBY, KCC, PMKSY and more.
onboarding.dashboardStep1: Manage listings, see upcoming bookings, track sales and saved items — all in one place.
onboarding.dashboardStep2: See your orders, upcoming equipment bookings, saved items and total spend.
onboarding.chatDesc: Message farmers/consumers without leaving the app. After a transaction, leave a star rating to help the community.
onboarding.completeDesc: Explore at your own pace. You can re-open this tour anytime from the dashboard.

payment.disclaimer: This is a simulated payment gateway for the prototype. No real charge is made.
